headline: Day 1 — warm-up phase, building the foundation.
read: Page is in its 14-day warm-up, so I'm deliberately holding cadence down to avoid new-page spam flags — expect followers to look flat until ~mid-July, then accelerate as posting ramps and the $7/day video-view campaign matures into a retargeting pool. Nothing here is broken; this is the plan.
next_move: Ship the first 3 Reels (reach engine), keep comment-driving questions flowing, and stand up the owned FB group as the nurture room. First real read on what's landing comes from the Monday report.
